zh.lifeSummary: 當Dame Grizel Baillie於大約1608年出生在蘇格蘭度福利爾時，她的父親Sir William Baillie of Lamington51歲，母親Grizel Hamilton47歲。她於大約1630年與Sir Robert Kirkpatrick 17th Laird of Closeburne結婚。他們至少是1個兒子和2個女兒的父母。她去世於1664年在蘇格蘭雷福福爾佩斯利享年57歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Dame Grizel Baillie于大约1608年出生在苏格兰度福利爾时，她的父亲Sir William Baillie of Lamington51岁，母亲Grizel Hamilton47岁。她于大约1630年与Sir Robert Kirkpatrick 17th Laird of Closeburne结婚。他们至少是1个儿子和2个女儿的父母。她去世于1664年在苏格兰雷福福爾佩斯利享年57岁。

nameMeanings.name: Baillie
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: from Older Scots baillie, baili. In Scotland, a baillie was a status name for any of various officials, including the chief magistrate in a barony and (later) the chief magistrate or administrative officer of a barony or district. Etymologically, this is the same word as English Bailey , but the functions as well as the spelling of the two officials were different in England and Scotland.
topographic name from Older Scots bailli ‘outer court of a castle’; see Bailey 3 and Bale 1.

variants.name: Bailey
meanings: English: status name for a steward or official, from Middle English bailli ‘manager, administrator’ (Old French baillis, from Late Latin baiulivus, an adjectival derivative of baiulus ‘attendant, carrier, porter’).
English: habitational name from Bailey in Little Mitton, Lancashire, named with Old English beg ‘berry’ + lēah ‘woodland clearing’.

English: occasionally a topographic name for someone who lived by the outer wall of a castle, from Middle English (Old French) bailli ‘outer courtyard of a castle’ (Old French bail(le) ‘enclosure’, a derivative of bailer ‘to enclose’). This term became a placename in its own right, denoting a district beside a fortification or wall, as in the case of the Old Bailey in London, which formed part of the early medieval outer wall of the city.

nameMeanings.name: Grizel
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Medieval vernacular form of Griselda , used particularly in Scotland, and in the north of England at least as late as the 18th century. The name has now died out, no doubt in part because of its similarity to the vocabulary word grizzle meaning ‘to grumble or whine’.

en.lifeSummary: When Dame Grizel Baillie was born about 1608, in Dumfriesshire, Scotland, her father, Sir William Baillie of Lamington, was 51 and her mother, Grizel Hamilton, was 47. She married Sir Robert Kirkpatrick 17th Laird of Closeburne about 1630. They were the parents of at least 1 son and 2 daughters. She died in 1664, in Paisley, Renfrewshire, Scotland, at the age of 57.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Dame Grizel Baillie est née environ 1608, à Dumfriesshire, Écosse, son père, Sir William Baillie of Lamington, avait 51 ans et sa mère, Grizel Hamilton, avait 47 ans. Elle a épousé Sir Robert Kirkpatrick 17th Laird of Closeburne environ 1630. Ils ont eu au moins 1 fils et 2 filles. Elle est décédée en 1664, à Paisley, Renfrewshire, Écosse, à l’âge de 57 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Dame Grizel Baillie um 1608 in Dumfriesshire, Scotland geboren wurde, war ihr Vater Sir William Baillie of Lamington 51 und ihre Mutter Grizel Hamilton 47. Sie hat um 1630 Sir Robert Kirkpatrick 17th Laird of Closeburne geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 1 Sohn und 2 Töchter. Sie starb 1664 im Alter von 57 Jahren in Paisley, Renfrewshire, Scotland.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Dame Grizel Baillie è nata il circa 1608 nel Dumfriesshire, Scotland, sua padre, Sir William Baillie of Lamington, aveva 51 anni e sua madre, Grizel Hamilton, aveva 47 anni. Lei sposato Sir Robert Kirkpatrick 17th Laird of Closeburne circa 1630. Erano genitori di almeno 1 figlio e 2 figlie. Morì nel 1664, nel Paisley, Renfrewshire, Scotland, all'età di 57 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: Dame Grizel Baillieが約1608年にスコットランドダムフリーシュアイアで生まれた時，父Sir William Baillie of Lamingtonは51歳，母Grizel Hamiltonは47歳であった。約1630年にSir Robert Kirkpatrick 17th Laird of Closeburneと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも1人の息子と2人の娘の親であった。彼女は1664年にスコットランドレンフリューシュアイアペイスリーで57歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Dame Grizel Baillie(이)가 대략 1608년 스컷랜드 드프리실르에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Sir William Baillie of Lamington(은)는 51세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Grizel Hamilton(은)는 47세였다. 그녀는 대략 1630년 Sir Robert Kirkpatrick 17th Laird of Closeburne(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 한 명의 아들과 두 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1664년 스컷랜드 렌프레w실르 파이슬리에서 57세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Dame Grizel Baillie nasceu aproximadamente 1608, em Dumfriesshire, Scotland, seu pai, Sir William Baillie of Lamington, tinha 51 anos e sua mãe, Grizel Hamilton, tinha 47 anos. Ela casou-se com Sir Robert Kirkpatrick 17th Laird of Closeburne aproximadamente 1630. Eles tiveram pelo menos 1 filho e 2 filhas. Ela faleceu em 1664, em Paisley, Renfrewshire, Scotland, com 57 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Dame Grizel Baillie родилась около 1608 г. в местности думфриессхир, Шотландия, её отцу по имени Sir William Baillie of Lamington было 51 год, а матери, которую звали Grizel Hamilton, 47. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Sir Robert Kirkpatrick 17th Laird of Closeburne около 1630 г. У них был по крайней мере 1 сын и 2 дочери. Она умерла в 1664 г. в местности пеисли, ренфрюшир, Шотландия в возрасте 57 лет.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Dame Grizel Baillie nació aproximadamente 1608, en Dumfriesshire, Scotland, su papá, Sir William Baillie of Lamington, tenía 51 años y su mamá, Grizel Hamilton, tenía 47 años. Se casó con Sir Robert Kirkpatrick 17th Laird of Closeburne aproximadamente 1630. Fueron padres de por lo menos 1 hijo y 2 hijas. Murió en 1664, en Paisley, Renfrewshire, Scotland, a la edad de 57 años.
